title: EIA Fuel Mix Hourly JSON API
description:
Hourly fuel mix for all regions and balancing authorities in the United States as reported by the EIA-930 dataset.

ℹ️ EIA data can be delayed or revised. To avoid missing updates, we:
* Check for new data and revisions throughout the day for the previous 24 hours.
* At 04:00 UTC, recheck the past 30 days for any changes.
In both cases, updates are only applied when the new values are non-null.

⚠️ For the most accurate and up to date ISO/RTO fuel data, we recommend using their respective datasets instead.

📝 This dataset was utilized in *[SPP Expansion Provides a Blueprint for the Future of the Grid](https://blog.gridstatus.io/spp-expansion-west/)*
